projects.name: Uber Backend - Ride-Hailing REST API
projects.description: Scalable ride-hailing backend built with Java and Spring Boot. Includes REST APIs for user registration, driver matching, ride booking, and fare calculation with layered architecture and Dockerized deployment.

projects.name: MediCore-Hospital Management
projects.description: Enterprise hospital management system with patient records, doctor scheduling, and billing modules. Java Spring Boot microservices architecture with PostgreSQL and secure JWT authentication.

projects.name: Travel World
projects.description: Full-stack travel web app for browsing and booking travel packages with authentication and admin dashboard. Implements JWT auth, bcrypt password security, and CRUD controls for tour package management.

projects.name: Chat App
projects.description: Real-time chat application with Socket.io enabling instant messaging, chat rooms, and presence indicators. Node.js & Express backend with room-based architecture.

projects.name: Voting DApp
projects.description: Blockchain-based voting system with end-to-end on-chain vote recording. Integrates Solidity smart contracts with React frontend, MetaMask, and admin controls for election timing and candidate management.
